name: Endorphin Kit
descs:
When gaining [Breath] Potency from Skill effects, gain 1 [Breath] Potency and +1 [Breath] Count.

If the Skill's Affinity was Envy, the ally gains 2 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count instead.

When gaining [Breath] Potency from Skill effects, gain 2 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count.

If the Skill's Affinity was Envy, the ally gains 3 [Breath] Potency and +3 [Breath] Count instead.

When gaining [Breath] Potency from Skill effects, gain 3 [Breath] Potency and +3 [Breath] Count.

If the Skill's Affinity was Envy, the ally gains 4 [Breath] Potency and +4 [Breath] Count instead.
